# Pairs with sample_dual_upload_individual/ancestrydna.txt; expected merge
# concordance counts are hand-curated in expected_concordance.json.
#
# This data file is build 37 (GRCh37). All genotypes are re-synthesized from
# coordinates; no real user genotypes are present. Header is padded with
# enough comment lines to land in 23andMe v5 detection (>=15 comments).
#
# Buckets covered (see expected_concordance.json):
#   match           : rs1001, rs1002, rs1003, rs1008, (3:1000) collapsed-rsid
#   filled_nocall   : rs1004 (S2 nocall), rs1005 (S1 nocall)
#   discordant      : rs1006, rs1007, rs1009, (3:2000) collapsed-rsid
#   unique_S1       : rs1012, rs1013, rs1014, rs1015
#   unique_S2       : (in ancestrydna.txt only)
#

# https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/assembly/GCF_000001405.13/
